title: [Nyessem, Dark Cave]
description: A handful of flickering torches casts dim light across the area, barely revealing the details of the curved stone walls.  Water trickles through lichen-covered cracks and ridges, pooling into shallow puddles on the uneven floor.  In the center of the cave stands a saltglass-lined driftwood display case, its surface glistening in the heavy, humid air.
